reviews.review_description:
This game really tests your reflexes. It's basically non-rhythmic beat saber with guns. My shoulders were pretty tired after pointing and shooting for that long! However, I was at 16k points and still going strong when all of a sudden the game froze. I was able to exit via the oculus menu but the janky fractured sound continued until I opened another app. I thought my Q2 was going to break!

Pros:
- great at testing reflexes
- targeted workout (shoulders, isometric)
- cool idea...give us more!

Cons: 
- why the weird spaceship in the background? Seems out of place. How about some trippy moving/evolving backgrounds instead?
- the music was...odd
- the freeze bug! I'll see if uninstalling and re-installing makes a difference

This game shows a lot of promise, but needs a lot more content and some fixes.
